note: ForkCaster starter cookbook — built-in, works with no API keys. 'gentle' = dose-day safe (low fat, bland, small volume).

recipes.name: Greek yogurt power bowl + whey
steps: Stir the whey into the yogurt until smooth.
Top with berries, chia, and honey.

recipes.name: Egg & egg-white scramble
steps: Soften the pepper in a sprayed nonstick pan, 2 min.
Add eggs and whites; scramble low and slow.
Fold in feta off heat; serve with toast.

recipes.name: Overnight oats + whey
steps: Whisk milk and whey until smooth.
Stir in oats, peanut butter, cinnamon.
Refrigerate overnight; top with banana.

recipes.name: Cottage cheese & banana
steps: Bowl, slice, sprinkle. Eat slowly.

recipes.name: Protein pancakes
steps: Blend everything but the berries into a batter.
Cook 3 small pancakes on a nonstick pan.
Top with strawberries.

recipes.name: Toast, eggs & extra whites
steps: Scramble the egg and whites gently, no butter needed in nonstick.
Serve on dry or lightly buttered toast. Small plate on purpose.

recipes.name: Chicken burrito bowl
steps: Layer rice, beans, chicken, lettuce.
Top with salsa and a squeeze of lime.

recipes.name: Turkey & avocado wrap
steps: Spread avocado and mustard on the wrap.
Layer turkey, spinach, tomato; roll tight and halve.

recipes.name: Tuna salad on greens
steps: Mix tuna with mayo and Dijon.
Pile onto dressed greens; crackers on the side.

recipes.name: Ginger chicken congee, extra chicken
ingredients: Salt — a pinch at the end
steps: Simmer rice, broth, and ginger 35–45 min, stirring now and then, until porridge-thick.
Stir in shredded chicken to warm through.
Finish with scallion and a small pinch of salt. Eat warm and slow.

recipes.name: Chicken noodle soup, extra chicken
steps: Simmer carrot and celery in broth until tender.
Add noodles and chicken; warm through.
Saltines on the side.

recipes.name: Grilled chicken Caesar (light)
ingredients: Light Caesar dressing — 1.5 tbsp, on the side
steps: Slice the grilled chicken over the romaine.
Top with parmesan and croutons; dip, don't pour, the dressing.

recipes.name: Sheet-pan salmon & green beans
steps: Roast oiled potatoes at 425°F for 15 min.
Add salmon and green beans; season; roast 12–14 min more.
Finish with lemon.

recipes.name: Sirloin & broccoli stir-fry
steps: Sear beef hard in a hot pan; set aside.
Stir-fry broccoli and garlic with a splash of water, lidded, 3 min.
Return beef with soy and sesame; serve over rice.

recipes.name: Baked chicken parm (light)
steps: Dip chicken in egg white, press into panko; bake at 425°F ~18 min.
Top with marinara and mozzarella; bake until melted.
Serve over quickly sautéed zucchini noodles.

recipes.name: Poached cod & white rice
steps: Slide cod into barely simmering salted water with lemon; poach 7–9 min.
Serve over rice with steamed carrots. No sauce on purpose.

recipes.name: Turkey rice bowl, mild
steps: Brown the turkey; drain if needed; season mild.
Bowl over rice with steamed zucchini.

recipes.name: Pork tenderloin & sweet potato
steps: Roast the rubbed tenderloin and halved sweet potato at 425°F ~20 min.
Add oiled asparagus for the last 8 min.
Rest the pork 5 min before slicing.

recipes.name: Shrimp tacos (3)
steps: Sear chili-dusted shrimp 2 min per side.
Warm tortillas; fill with slaw and shrimp.
Lime-spiked yogurt on top.

recipes.name: Cottage cheese & pineapple
steps: Combine. Done.

recipes.name: Skyr cup
steps: Peel lid.

recipes.name: Vanilla whey, sipped slowly
steps: Shake hard. Sip slowly — liquid protein for days solids are hard.

recipes.name: Greek yogurt, plain
steps: Cold and simple.

recipes.name: Beef jerky & an apple
steps: Glovebox-proof.

recipes.name: String cheese & almonds
steps: Pocket snack.
